new_classes.label_en: Semi-sparkling wine other than that of subheading 2204 10, in containers ≤ 2 l — in bottles with mushroom stopper or otherwise put up with excess pressure ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar (CN 2204 29 10)
new_classes.label_de: Halbschaumwein, ausgen. solcher der Unterposition 2204 10, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger — in Flaschen mit Schaumweinstopfen oder anderweitig aufgemacht mit Überdruck von 1 bar bis unter 3 bar (KN 2204 29 10)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes (other than sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10), presented either in bottles with mushroom-shaped stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or otherwise put up with an excess pressure due to dissolved carbon dioxide of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar measured at 20 °C, in containers holding more than 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) wine from fresh grapes (FreshGrapeOriginQuality), (2) not sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10 (complement of SparklingWineQuality), (3) semi-sparkling pressure quality (SemiSparklingWineQuality, ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar at 20 °C via hasExcessPressureAtTwentyDegrees datatype restrictions), and (4) container volume > 2 L (LargeContainer via BFO has_part). The criterion for the alternative presentation as 'bottles with mushroom stopper held by ties or fastenings' (MushroomStopperBottlePackaging) is partially captured via the LargeContainer restriction, but MushroomStopperBottlePackaging is modelled as a subclass of Packaging (not necessarily LargeContainer), so an exact disjunction between the two presentation forms (mushroom stopper bottles OR semi-sparkling pressure ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar) cannot be fully expressed as a simple OWL intersection without a union/disjunction constructor in the propose_axioms tool. The current axiom set requires BOTH LargeContainer AND semi-sparkling pressure to hold simultaneously, which does not correctly cover the mushroom-stopper-bottle alternative (which may be in any container size). This structural limitation reduces coverage. Also, the sibling code 2204 22 10 (SemiSparklingWineMediumContainer22042210) covers containers > 2 L and ≤ 10 L; the boundary between 2204 29 10 (> 2 L, any size) and 2204 22 10 is that 22042910 explicitly appears under the '2204 29' branch (other, i.e., > 2 L without the ≤ 10 L restriction), but the MushroomStopperBottlePackaging alternative also applies regardless of container size. The full disjunctive condition (mushroom-stopper bottle OR semi-sparkling ≥ 1–< 3 bar, in containers > 2 L) cannot be expressed as a pure intersection with the available axiom vocabulary.
